products.section_desc: Two technologies, one obsession: lightness and reliability. 30 years of field experience in every seam.
products.etanche_desc: Inspired by kitesurfing. Sealed air chamber, single inflation in 3 minutes, no blower needed. Ultra-light and portable by one person.
products.soufflerie_desc: Dupont de Nemours automotive airbag fabric. Permanent blower for very large formats. Packs into a sail bag without folding. 10-year warranty.
products.tentes_desc: Same technology as our screens. Fast setup, no tools, no blower.
products.mobilier_desc: Sofas, armchairs, counters. Light, portable, elegant.
products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: A complete range for all your events
products.ecrans_desc: From 2m to 24m, the lightest screens in the world. Blower or airtight technology.
products.arches_desc: Inflatable arches for sports and promotional events.

technology.quote_1_before: No need for a crane to move me, my
technology.quote_2: I arrived alone in a 12 m3 van and I leave alone for a well-deserved rest until my next session
technology.story_title: From classified defense to cinema screen
technology.story_p1_before: It all starts in Lyon, the historic textile capital. Looking for a fabric that was both light and indestructible, we discovered that
technology.story_p1_after: used exactly what we were looking for.
technology.story_p2_before: Manufacturers told us it was classified defense. We did not give up. After months of investigation, we identified the fabric: a
technology.story_p2_highlight: high-tenacity polyamide from Dupont de Nemours
technology.story_p3: For the airtight range, inspiration came from elsewhere: on a Hong Kong beach, watching kitesurfers. Their inflatable tubes were light, resistant, and perfectly waterproof. The technology was there, right before our eyes.
technology.title: Our Technology
technology.subtitle: 30 years of innovation for open-air cinema
technology.leger_desc: Our patented technology makes our screens 3 times lighter than the competition.
technology.montage_desc: Setup in 10 minutes by 2 people, without tools.
technology.garantie_desc: Our screens are guaranteed for 10 years, parts and labor.
technology.taille_desc: The world largest inflatable screen, 24 meters wide.

usecases.section_desc: Our screens adapt to all contexts: from a private garden to a 50,000-seat stadium. Here are the most common uses.
usecases.cta_text: Have a different project? We adapt.
usecases.cinema_desc: Festivals, summer screenings, film clubs. Our blower screens from 10 to 24m offer a perfect image even with a 5000 lumen projector. The airtight range (2 to 8m) is ideal for intimate screenings.
usecases.cinema_examples: Festivals, film clubs, summer screenings, outdoor cinemas
usecases.festival_desc: Live broadcast of artists on stage, real-time relay for distant spectators. Our 15 to 24m screens provide perfect visibility at over 200 meters.
usecases.festival_examples: Music festivals, concerts, shows, outdoor operas
usecases.corporate_desc: Seminars, conferences, product launches. Our screens set up in 10 minutes in any space. The airtight range is silent (no blower), ideal for presentations.
usecases.corporate_examples: Seminars, conferences, team building, product launches, AGM
usecases.mariage_desc: Create an unforgettable cinema evening. The airtight range is perfect: silent (no blower), light, and set up in 5 minutes by one person.
usecases.mariage_examples: Weddings, birthdays, garden parties, private evenings, family celebrations
usecases.sport_desc: World Cup, Olympics, championship matches - our giant screens allow thousands of people to gather. The 24m format offers visibility at over 200 meters.
usecases.sport_examples: Fan zones, stadiums, bars and restaurants, public squares, municipal sports events
usecases.drivein_desc: The drive-in format has made a spectacular comeback. Our 10 to 15m blower screens are perfect for turning a parking lot into a cinema. Setup in 30 minutes.
usecases.drivein_examples: Drive-in cinemas, summer tours, municipal events, shopping centers
usecases.hotel_desc: Luxury hotels and resorts use our airtight screens to offer cinema evenings to their guests. Total silence and elegance make it an asset for the customer experience.
usecases.hotel_examples: Ritz Carlton, beach resorts, boutique hotels, holiday clubs, spas
usecases.title: They trust us
usecases.subtitle: Thousands of events organized worldwide

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: 30 years of passion for open-air cinema
story.intro_quote: "I must admit I am a bit lazy." But this apparent laziness hides 30 years of relentless perseverance.
story.ch1996_text: To learn how to set up structures, we headed to the village. The fairground workers, often rejected, agreed to share their knowledge. Two days of intensive learning. At the end: "Now you're a real fairground worker, you can go on tour."
story.ch1998_text: In La Trinité-sur-Mer, Brittany, a sailmaker's workshop becomes the birthplace of the first screens. Jean-Christophe, master sailmaker, masters sewing techniques. Together, they develop a revolutionary screen that collapses into a sail bag after each screening.
story.ch2004_text: On a Hong Kong beach, a kitesurf catches the eye. Its inflatable tubes, light and resistant, spark a crazy idea: what if we could project films outdoors with a screen as light as a sail?
story.ch2005_text: In Lyon, the former textile capital, an investigation leads to the best-kept secret in the automotive industry: airbag fabric. A high-tenacity polyamide from DuPont de Nemours. Light, indestructible, perfect.
story.ch2010_text: Inspired by kitesurfing, the first airtight screens are born. Sealed air chamber, no blower, ultra-light. From 2m to 8m, they revolutionize the market.
story.ch2020_text: February 2020, Shenzhen. COVID strikes. Impossible to return home. Rather than doing nothing, enrollment at university to learn Chinese. China becomes a second home.
story.chToday_text: From China, with a partner factory in Dongguan, Hallucine continues its mission: to make its screens known to the widest audience. From Brittany to Shenzhen, the adventure continues.

realisations.title: Our Achievements
realisations.subtitle: Some of our emblematic projects
realisations.section_desc: From festivals to corporate events, from beaches to stadiums, our screens transform every venue into a unique experience.

faq.section_desc: Answers to the questions we are most often asked.
faq.q1: What is an inflatable cinema screen?
faq.a1: An inflatable cinema screen is a lightweight, portable structure that inflates with air to create an outdoor projection surface. Unlike rigid screens or metal structures, it packs into a bag, sets up in minutes, and requires no tools or lifting equipment. Hallucine manufactures inflatable screens from 2 to 24 meters wide.
faq.q2: Why choose Hallucine over another manufacturer?
faq.a2: Three main reasons. First, our screens are 3 times lighter than the competition thanks to our technical fabrics. Second, we have 30 years of field experience. Third, we offer a 10-year warranty on the structure, which is unique in the industry.
faq.q3: What is the difference between your two screen ranges?
faq.a3: The airtight range (2 to 8m) uses a sealed air chamber: you inflate once, the screen stays in shape all evening without electricity. The blower range (5 to 24m) uses a permanent blower for large formats. Both ranges are guaranteed for 10 years.
faq.q4: How much does a Hallucine inflatable screen cost?
faq.a4: The price depends on the size and technology chosen. Contact us for a free personalized quote. We also offer rental options for one-time events.
faq.a5: Yes. We deliver worldwide from our partner factory in Dongguan (China). Delivery times are 2 to 4 weeks depending on the destination. For Europe, count about 2 weeks.
faq.q6: Do you also offer inflatable tents and furniture?
faq.a6: Yes. We use the same airtight technology to manufacture inflatable tents and event furniture (sofas, armchairs, bars, counters). Everything inflates in minutes, without a blower.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our inflatable screens
